purpose: Headed challenge resolver on known Cloudflare / bot-wall pages

results.name: nopecha_demo
results.notes: Intentional CF Turnstile demo. Passive wait + click attempts did not clear within 2 attempts.

results.name: nowsecure
results.notes: Classic CF test site; currently serves nodriver demo page, not active interstitial.

results.name: longforecast_sensex
results.notes: Previously showed Robot Challenge on /sensex-forecast (404 now). /sensex loads clean.

results.name: longforecast_404
results.notes: Redirects to 404; no captcha on this path today.

results.name: timesofindia_section
results.notes: Section URL 404; article URLs from search work.

captcha_resolver_works_on: passive interstitials that clear naturally (TOI article, longforecast/sensex, nowsecure)
captcha_resolver_fails_on: nopecha.com/demo/cloudflare — deliberate Turnstile demo designed to resist automation
verdict.recommendation: Use nopecha demo as negative control; for positive CF click tests need live Turnstile pages (rate-limited, may vary by IP).
